positive: Minimalist, stylish abstract geometric mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant sunset gradient. The mountains are represented by clean, solid black geometric shapes (like triangles and parallelograms) arranged in ascending layers. The gradient background transitions smoothly from deep indigo (top) to warm fiery orange and magenta (bottom). Focus on extreme contrast, sharp lines, and negative space. Perfect for textile printing. Highly symmetrical and centered composition. Vector art quality, graphic design style, clean ink work, high saturation, pop art inspired.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logos, gradients in shadows, blurry edges, low detail, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, unrefined, jpeg artifacts
